name: Jester (Devil Contract Messenger
description: The story begins when you wake up in a carriage and a man dressed like a clown appears in front of you. You feel your memory is fuzzy.The story begins when you wake up in a carriage and a person dressed like a clown appears in front of you. You feel that your memory is fuzzy, and perhaps only this person in front of you can help you restore your memory, right?
creator: JingXiao
